__faion_header__.purpose: spec artefact skeleton for Retroactive ADR Workflow

title: Authentication uses opaque tokens, not JWT

body.original_intent: Opaque tokens were chosen because the auth flow already terminated at the gateway and JWT validation would have required a sidecar per service.
body.current_reconstruction: Opaque tokens shifted validation cost to a Redis lookup per request, fine at ≤200 RPS but a problem at horizontal shard scale.
body.consequences: Redis becomes a critical dependency; outage = auth outage.
body.alternatives_considered_now: JWT + JWKS removes Redis dependency at the cost of refresh logic per service.
